_notes.prices: No prices are shown anywhere on the printed menu. internalPriceRef ('$55' etc.) and the menu label ('San Gimignano') are for the STAFF picking a menu in the editor only — never render either on the printed page.
_notes.eventFields: eventTitle / eventDate / logoUrl are entered fresh per print, not stored as part of a menu or alternate — see BUILD-SPEC.md.
_notes.alternates: Each menu's 'alternates' array holds ZERO OR MORE named, saved variants (a library), not a single fixed alt. extraItems across ALL courses in one alternate must total 2 or fewer.
_notes.extraItems.courseIndex: 0-based index into the parent menu's courses array — identifies which course group the extra dish is appended to.
